description: Architect and develop scalable Micro Frontend systems for SaaS platforms using React.js, Next.js, Vue.js, and TypeScript.
Designed reusable UI Design System components that improved development speed and consistency across applications.
Built complex business modules including Dealership Management Systems, Kanban workflow boards, Deal Views, and Finance Applications.
Implemented RESTful APIs, optimized data-fetching strategies, and state management using modern patterns.
Conducted frontend code reviews, testing, performance optimization, and sprint planning.
Collaborated with product managers, designers, and backend engineers within Agile teams to deliver production features.
Led frontend development for a SaaS healthcare and e-commerce platform, architecting the entire frontend system, UI design system, and reusable component architecture.
Implemented advanced TypeScript patterns and a structured state management strategy to ensure predictable data flow, maintainability, and high-performance application behavior.
Designed and developed complex dashboards with interactive chart visualizations, delivering core business modules such as Shop, Cart, Orders, Sales, Doctors Management, Reports, and Agent systems.
Mentored junior developers by providing architectural guidance, code reviews, and structured development workflows, ensuring consistent engineering standards and timely feature delivery.
Developed responsive and accessible UIs using TypeScript, JavaScript, React, Next.js, Vue, Nuxt, and Alpine.js.
Integrated REST APIs with robust error handling and managed complex state using Redux, Zustand, and TanStack.
Optimized frontend performance using code-splitting, lazy loading, and caching strategies.
Built interactive animations using GSAP, Framer Motion, and AOS.
Developed responsive frontend interfaces using React, Tailwind CSS, and Material UI.
Built backend APIs using Node.js, Express.js, MongoDB, and Mongoose.
Implemented reusable UI components and improved maintainability of the codebase.
Converted Figma designs into responsive pixel-perfect UIs using React.js, Next.js, TypeScript, and Tailwind CSS.
Integrated REST APIs and implemented core frontend features for live products.
Collaborated with designers and backend developers to deliver high-quality UI implementations.
